channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.description:

The malware is a...

The effort, codenamed Operation Ramz, took ...

Europol, in a statement issued Thursday, said the dismantling of ...

item.title: Phishing Attack Volume Down 20%, But Risk Still Rising
item.description: Hackers are valuing quality over quantity, using AI to upgrade their phishing attacks rather than multiply them....

item.description: Kyushu Electric Power Co., Inc. has disclosed a physical security incident that affects private data of more than 10 million customers. [...]...

item.title: ShinyHunters Exploits Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day (CVE-2026-35273) to Breach Universities
item.description: The ShinyHunters extortion crew exploited an unpatched flaw in Oracle PeopleSoft to break into enterprise systems, steal data, and demand payment to keep it private. The campaign hit universities hard...

item.title: Max-Severity Ivanti Flaw Exploited 24 Hours After Disclosure
item.description: Initial methods suggest attackers had likely mapped out Ivanti's asset landscape upfront and acted quickly once the exploit became public....

item.title: New Attacks Trick OpenClaw AI Agent Into Running Code and Leaking Secrets
item.description: Two security teams have shown, in separate research published this week, that OpenClaw, the popular self-hosted AI agent, can be driven to run attacker-controlled code or hand over sensitive data thro...

item.title: New GreatXML Exploit Bypasses Windows BitLocker via Recovery Partition XML Files
item.description:
Security researcher Chaotic Eclipse (aka Nightmare-Eclipse and MSNightmare) has released a new Windows BitLocker bypass dubbed GreatXML, a day after they published an exploit for Microsoft Defender.
...

item.title: Women’s health advocacy organization prepares mass suit against Clinical Diagnostics
item.description: In July 2025, the Nova ransomware gang stole cervical cancer screening data on 850,000 women held by Clinical Diagnostics (“Eurofins”). The lab paid them an undisclosed ransom amount, but that has not...

item.title: AI Broke Vulnerability Management. That's Why CISOs Are Moving Budget to BAS.
item.description: For thirty years, vulnerability management ran on a buffer: the months between when a vulnerability was found and when someone could figure out how to weaponize it. The solution was straightforward en...

item.title: OceanLotus Hits Vietnam Investors With SPECTRALVIPER in FireAnt Attack
item.description:
The Vietnam-aligned threat actor known as OceanLotus has been attributed to two distinct campaigns that targeted domestic entities and stock investors with a backdoor known as SPECTRALVIPER.
The camp...
